tools.name: Soldier
tools.evidence_snippet: Microsoft Defender Antivirus detects the Soldier implant as the following malware: Trojan:MSIL/SoldierAudio.A!dha

summary: Mint Sandstorm is a nation-state threat actor that has refined its tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) to attack high-value targets. The subgroup has demonstrated its ability to rapidly adopt new vulnerabilities into its playbooks and use custom tools to evade detection.
